plugins.name: optimind-docs
plugins.description: One command, /polish, that rebuilds Word and PDF reports as fully branded Optimind documents. Five role-specific subagents (Intake, Auditor, Classifier, DS-Extender, Renderer-QA) orchestrate a deterministic Python pipeline, extend the design system when novel elements appear, and auto-retry on QA failure. Source text is preserved verbatim; every run emits a classification sidecar and an HTML audit report.
